title: Energy Audit Planning
summary: The manual emphasizes the importance of planning an energy audit, including site visits, safety meetings, equipment checks, data collection, interviews, and documentation.

title: Audit Tools
summary: Free templates are available as tools for the energy audit.
evidence_quote: TOOLS FOR THE ENERGY AUDIT Free Templates

title: Audit Conduct Steps
summary: Conducting the audit involves site visits, sticking to the plan, preliminary walkthrough, safety toolbox meeting, equipment checks, data collection, interviews, and documentation.
evidence_quote: Conducting the Audit •Site Visits •Stick to your plan… unless reality hits you in the face! Preliminary WalkthroughSAFETY toolbox meeting Equipment Checks Data Collection Interviews Documentation

title: Data Analysis Tools
summary: Data analysis for the audit uses RETScreen, Excel, and ASHRAE Forms.
